title: Shinier Copper
description: Makes vanilla & modded copper blocks and items have an improved color palette while maintaining the new textures style
body:
This resource pack is a mix between the old copper color palettes from Create and the new vanilla versions of Minecraft. The textures of both Create 6.0+ and Minecraft vanilla remain the same, the only change is the **color palette** and some tweaks to some blocks and items.
- Clean copper is brighter and has a red-orange tone.
- Exposed copper is rougher and duller and more yellow-brown.
- Weathered copper is dirtier and brown-green.
- Oxidized copper is almost vanilla, I just tweaked the saturation of some colors a little bit.

Create is one of my favorite mods, I use it all the time, and I loved the copper textures and colors from the old versions of the mod.
Shinier, more saturated and stylized, instead of the vanilla copper that looks dull and ugly.
(Waiting and working for the new version 1.21.9.)

**I'm still updating the gallery**

## COMPATIBILITY:
- Minecraft vanilla (until 1.21.10)
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- [Musket Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/musket-mod) by ewewukek
  - [Muskets Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/muskets-overhaul) or [Flintl0cks - Musket Mod Overhaul](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/flintl0cks) using my compatibility addon [Muskets Overhaul + Shinier Copper Compatibility](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/muskets-overhaul-shinier-copper-compatibility)
- [Immersive Aircraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-aircraft)
- [F708 Guns (Bren Remake)](https://modrinth.com/mod/f708-gun-mod)
- [Create Stuff 'N Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-stuff-additions)

## UPCOMING COMPATIBILITY:
- [Create Immersive Aircrafts](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/create-immersive-aircrafts-resource-pack), [Create Immersive Aircraft : Warship](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/create-immersive-aircraft-warship) and [Create Immersive Aircraft : Bamboo Hopper](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/create-immersive-aircraft-bamboo-hopper) using a compatibility addon or creating my own pack between Create, Immersive Aircraft and Shinier Copper.
- [Create Factory Logistics](https://modrinth.com/mod/create_factory_logistics)
- and more...

## CREDITS:
**_Kisutora_** (Who fixed some problems when using Complementary Shaders, and helped me with the textures, useful tips and resource pack management, THANKS A LOT!)

## (Versions 1.20.1 and earlier) Why not use the mod's built-in legacy copper texture?
Create already has a built-in resource pack changing the copper ingot and blocks, but doesn't change the raw and ore version, and I also don't like the retexture from the blocks.
So I made my own pack, with retextured blocks and the new raw and ore version.

## (Versions 1.21.1 and later) Why not use other resource packs that returns old Create copper?
This resource pack, unlike others, does not copy-paste the old texture from Create's mod, instead I used the new textures and changed the color palette carefully.

## Does this also work in vanilla Minecraft, without the mods?
****YES!**** I changed Create's, vanilla Minecraft and other blocks, items, entities and gui to match, but there are no problems if you don't have the mods installed.

## Is this really necessary?
****MAYBE?**** I know this is a very small and maybe unnecessary resource pack, but Create mod is almost vanilla for me, I play with it 99% of the time, and although I really like Create's old color palette, but I wanted to give it my own touch:
- In 1.20.1 it bothered me when the copper from the mod and vanilla looked different.
- In 1.21.1 it makes me angry the vanilla copper looks so bad and ugly.
